message:
feat(engine): add E2E harness, semantic transport ledger, service endpoint template, and extension host

Four large feature modules from concurrent agent development:

1. e2e_harness.rs (+931 lines): End-to-end test harness infrastructure
   for orchestrating full parser→lowering→interpreter pipeline tests
   with evidence collection, artifact generation, and gate evaluation.

2. semantic_transport_ledger.rs (+931 lines): Append-only ledger for
   recording semantic transport events with content-addressed entries,
   Merkle proof generation, and deterministic replay capability.

3. policy_controller/service_endpoint_template.rs (+437 lines): Template
   engine for generating service endpoint configurations from policy
   controller state, supporting variable interpolation and conditional
   sections.

4. franken-extension-host/src/lib.rs (+937 lines): Extension host
   runtime for loading, sandboxing, and managing lifecycle of
   FrankenEngine extensions with capability-based security boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
